/tmp/codeql-scratch-a0efab335a3dc736/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/login-server.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/login-server.dir/account.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/login-server.dir/ipban.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/login-server.dir/login.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/login-server.dir/loginchrif.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/login-server.dir/loginclif.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/login-server.dir/logincnslif.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/login-server.dir/loginlog.cpp.o" -o /home/runner/work/moonlight/moonlight/login-server  -lm -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt /home/runner/work/moonlight/moonlight/lib/libcommonr.a -Wl,-Bdynamic -lmysqlclient /home/runner/work/moonlight/moonlight/lib/libcommon_baser.a -lm -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -Wl,-Bdynamic -lz /home/runner/work/moonlight/moonlight/lib/libyaml-cppr.a
